title: Siberia
writer: Bartley Campbell, Nicholas Dunaew, Eve Unsell
actors: Alma Rubens, Edmund Lowe, Lou Tellegen
plot: Officer in the Imperial Russian Army, Petroff, is in love with Sonia, a schoolteacher who casts her lot with revolutionaries. During a time of suppression, she is exiled with her brother to Siberia. There Petroff is sent in the di...
